'''Coruscant Fashions''' was a high-end retailer located within the [[Core District/Legends|Core District]] of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]]. Like many of the attractions within the Core District, the store's architecture represented a specific [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]; specifically [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Coruscant Fashions specialized in fashion from the cities of Coruscant and other planets in the region.
